nodes.speaker: Carpenter Neri
nodes.text: Need a hand? I keep Coral Harbor's beams, piers, and hull braces from falling apart.

nodes.speaker: Carpenter Neri
nodes.text: Nothing dramatic today. Just patching boardwalk planks and reinforcing storm shutters before the next tide.

nodes.speaker: Carpenter Neri
nodes.text: The bridge up north is in rough shape, but I can mend it. Bring me five Stonebind Rivets from the Stone Vault and I'll get started.

nodes.speaker: Carpenter Neri
nodes.text: Let me see what you've brought.

nodes.speaker: Carpenter Neri
nodes.text: I'll keep watch for the tide.
